jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at HealthifyMe
jsonLd.description:
HealthifyMe invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HealthifyMe:
HealthifyMe is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HealthifyMe!
